package rulecoverage

func NegativeMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfig() string {
    ruleID := "main_or_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_server_bootstrap_and_business_config"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Entrypoints that do too much without startup composition helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
